publicTitle: WorkshopLM — From conversations to professional knowledge work
thumbnailText: One thought. Every format. Sources attached.

shots.title: The promise
shots.caption: One Workshop. Every format. Sources attached.
shots.narration: WorkshopLM turns conversations and Sources into professional knowledge work—every expression sharing one Style and one source trail.

shots.title: Codex is the conversation surface
shots.caption: One plugin keeps conversation and production together
shots.narration: WorkshopLM is one unified plugin. Codex stays the conversation surface, uses the project's grounded tools, and opens the visual Workshop only when spatial editing is useful.

requiredEvidence.label: Legible Codex host footage opening the correct local Workshop

shots.title: Messy thought becomes a grounded Map
shots.caption: A raw brainstorm becomes a grounded visual Map
shots.narration: I begin with an honestly dated, unstructured brainstorm. OpenAI Realtime preserves the spoken turn, then GPT-5.6 shapes it with the selected sources into a semantic Map. Every factual node keeps its exact source locator.

requiredEvidence.label: Founder-brainstorm transcript used by the recorded Workshop

shots.title: Evidence remains inspectable and editable
shots.caption: Every claim stays inspectable and editable
shots.narration: This is not a flattened summary. I can open a factual claim to its exact excerpt, move it, or rewrite it. A meaningful change automatically marks dependent work as needing an update.

shots.title: First approval: Brief
shots.caption: The first approval turns the Map into a Brief
shots.narration: When the thinking is right, the first approval turns this exact Map into an inspectable Brief. Source coverage and unresolved evidence remain visible before creation begins.

shots.title: One reviewable visual system
shots.caption: Set the visual system once
shots.narration: Style is set once and stays reviewable, so every created format follows the same palette, typography, layout, image treatment, and negative rules.

shots.title: One Workshop, many expressions
shots.caption: Create connected professional knowledge work
shots.narration: The Presentation, Infographic, images, Audio Overview, Storyboard, and Video are different expressions of the same approved knowledge and Style.

requiredEvidence.label: Inspected six-image GPT Image 2 gallery capture

shots.title: Second approval: Storyboard
shots.caption: Review and approve the Storyboard before Video
shots.narration: Unlike a black-box video generator, WorkshopLM shows the Storyboard first. I can rewrite a panel, inspect its source, and then make the second and final blocking approval.

shots.title: Approved work renders locally
shots.caption: Only approved work becomes the narrated Video
shots.narration: The local HyperFrames worker accepts only that approved current Storyboard, synchronizes the OpenAI narration, and renders the Video. Show source still follows a factual claim through the Brief and Map to evidence.

shots.title: The submission proves the product
shots.caption: The brainstorm became the submission you just watched
shots.narration: Now the reveal: one messy thought became everything you just watched. The source trail, two human decisions, and build record stayed attached. WorkshopLM created the submission, while Codex accelerated the implementation and verification.
